title: Education Credential
description: Verifiable credential attesting that a person has been conferred an academic qualification by an institution.

name.description: Full name of the person to whom the credential is issued.

degree.description: The academic qualification conferred (e.g. "Bachelor of Science in Computer Science").

institution.description: Legal name of the institution that conferred the qualification.

dateConferred.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) on which the qualification was conferred.
